item.text:
Updated the lead follow-up contract to `LeadDigest` and propagated it through the typed chain. In [Shared/Lead.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-digest-upgrade-file-hinted-compiler-owned-air-IQHKtl/Shared/Lead.clasp), `LeadSummary` was replaced with `LeadDigest`, `LeadPlaybookLookup` now carries `owner` and `needsFollowUp`, and `LeadFollowUpState` now stores `digest : LeadDigest`.

In [Main.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-digest-upgrade-file-hinted-compiler-owned-air-IQHKtl/Main.clasp), the summary API and workflow-facing functions now use `LeadDigest`, the playbook request maps the new fields, and `main` reads the lookup request’s `owner`. The high-priority path now resolves to `"senior-ae"` as required.

Verification passed with `bash scripts/verify.sh`.
